name: Wieson Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Wieson Technologies Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells interconnect components and wireless components. It offers I/O connectors, board mount connectors, card and socket connecters, connecters and cables, cable assemblies, optical fiber components, wires, wireless modules, automotive electronics, and LED lighting products, as well as antennas. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
